en: I told y'all three years ago Ozempic had Hollywood in a chokehold.
I ain't lying. Y'all seen Oprah, she got the body of a 12-year-old boy.
ko: 거짓말 아니야. 오프라 봤지, 12살 남자애 몸매가 됐어.

en: She ain't never even been a 12-year-old boy. That shit is strong.
ko: 12살 남자애였던 적도 없는데. 그 약 진짜 세다.

en: Gayle look like she ain't had a bowel movement since she came back from space.
ko: 게일은 우주 갔다 온 후로 대변을 안 본 것 같아.

en: Her and the wig look confused.
ko: 본인이랑 가발이랑 둘 다 혼란스러워 보여.
